stock.choice_q: Which stock do you want to edit?
stock.import_desc:
Import items and stock levels from an Excel (.xlsx) or CSV/TXT file. The file columns must match the database fields. Required columns:
  • codigo          → Item code (required, unique key)
  • nombre          → Item name
  • Stock_tienda    → Shelf stock (on display in store)
  • Stock_total     → Store warehouse stock
  • Stock_central   → Central warehouse stock
  • Stock_esperado  → Minimum expected shelf stock

Optional columns: descripcion, categoria, seccion, precio
stock.fmt_incompatible: Unsupported format. Use Excel (.xlsx) or CSV/TXT.
stock.export_desc:
Generate an Excel report with all current stock levels. The file is saved automatically in documentos/stocks/. The report includes: Code, Name, Shelf Stock, Warehouse Stock,
Central Warehouse Stock and Expected Stock for each item.
stock.inventory_desc:
Access the shared inventory folder on Google Drive to view and manage inventory documents. Your default browser will open with the Google Drive
folder configured for this business.

Select whether the plan corresponds to

Do you want to undo the calibration of this plan?
The following will be deleted: scale, origin and walls.

To link an asset, you must first mark an exact location on the floor plan.

Do you want to activate the location pointer?
ubic.click_to_place: Click on the map to place the shelf
ubic.hw_fail: HARDWARE FAILURE: Bring the tag closer
ubic.sat_install_guide:
To generate the QR codes linked to exact coordinates, you must select the installation point on the map.

1. Press Continue to activate the crosshair.
2. Click on the map to mark the location.
3. You will be asked for a Name for the satellite after the click.

The A* navigation system has recalculated the real dimensions for route optimisation.

ubic.calib_mode_msg:
The telemetry system is about to start.

STEP 1: Select a VERTICAL wall on the map by clicking its endpoints (Start and End).
ubic.env_config_msg:
The scale and origin (0,0) have been set correctly.

Press the 🖌️ PAINT MODE button to activate wall drawing mode.
Outline the walls and obstacles of the premises: this is vital so the route engine avoids collisions.
